'use strict'; var test = require('tape'); var stringify = require('../'); test('nested', function (t) { t.plan(1); var obj = { c: 8, b: [{z:6,y:5,x:4},7], a: 3 }; t.equal(stringify(obj), '{"a":3,"b":[{"x":4,"y":5,"z":6},7],"c":8}'); }); test('cyclic (default)', function (t) { t.plan(1); var one = { a: 1 }; var two = { a: 2, one: one }; one.two = two; try { stringify(one); } catch (ex) { t.equal(ex.toString(), 'TypeError: Converting circular structure to JSON'); } }); test('cyclic (specifically allowed)', function (t) { t.plan(1); var one = { a: 1 }; var two = { a: 2, one: one }; one.two = two; t.equal(stringify(one, {cycles:true}), '{"a":1,"two":{"a":2,"one":"__cycle__"}}'); }); test('repeated non-cyclic value', function(t) { t.plan(1); var one = { x: 1 }; var two = { a: one, b: one }; t.equal(stringify(two), '{"a":{"x":1},"b":{"x":1}}'); }); test('acyclic but with reused obj-property pointers', function (t) { t.plan(1); var x = { a: 1 }; var y = { b: x, c: x }; t.equal(stringify(y), '{"b":{"a":1},"c":{"a":1}}'); });
